message:
feat(fcp-host): serialize capability constraints into COSE token claims

Add capability_constraints_from_request(), serialize/deserialize helpers
to encode CapabilityConstraints (resource_allow/deny, max_calls/bytes,
credential_allow) as CBOR claims inside CWT. Change credential_allow
from Vec<String> to Vec<CredentialId>. Token inspection now deserializes
constraints from claims instead of returning empty defaults. Add
issued_token_serializes_constraints_claim roundtrip test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
